description.value:
Prerequisite: Rogue Training, Level 8+

Your mastery of the arts of skulduggery has earned you a significant reputation.

  • Gain one Skill proficiency from: Acrobatics, Deception, Sleight of Hand, Stealth, and Streetwise.

  • Gain Expertise in one Skill you are already Proficient in from: Acrobatics, Deception, Sleight of Hand, Stealth, and Streetwise.

  • Once per turn, when you hit a target with an Attack, and you had Advantage on the Attack Roll, you can deal an additional 1d6 Bonus damage. (For a total of 2d6 bonus damage.)

  • You can perform two different Bonus actions during your turn.
